chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-384 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of bail application. 13.09.2021 Mr. Altaf Hussain Hisbani, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Ameer Hussain Solangi Advocate for complainant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G for the State. *************** O R D E R Applicant Qazi Akhtar Ali present on interim bail. Through instant Crl. Bail application, applicant Qazi Akhtar Ali son of Qazi Ghulam Hadi seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.88 of 2021 registered at Police Station, Halani under section 489-F, P.P.C. The applicant was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court subject to furnishing of solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR bond in the like amount vide order, dated 21.06.2021, now he seeks confirmation of the same. Briefly stated facts of the case are that on 10.10.2020, complainant Abdul Rehman lodged the aforementioned F.I.R. alleging therein that applicant/accused has borrowed some amount from complainant for which he issued a cheque dated 15.10.2020 of United Bank Ltd. Halani Branch, amounting to Rs.500,000/-, which was dishonored on its presentation. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.50,000/- to Rs.500,000/- by the applicant, equivalent to cheque amount. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.450,000/- requests for the grant of One week time for furnishing additional surety.

Halani Branch, amounting to Rs.500,000/-, which was dishonored on its presentation. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.50,000/- to Rs.500,000/- by the applicant, equivalent to cheque amount. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.450,000/- requests for the grant of One week time for furnishing additional surety. Accordingly, the interim bail granted to applicant vide order dated 21.06.2021 is hereby confirmed by consent subject to his furnishing additional surety of Rs. 450,000/- with fresh PR bond of Rs.500,000/- to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court within one weeks hereof. However, in case applicant fails to furnish additional surety within stipulated period, this Crl. Bail Application shall stands dismissed by recalling interim order dated 21.06.2021. Application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/*
